parameters.apprise_url_plus: plivo://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.auth_id_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.source_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Plivo destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise plivo:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Plivo Messages API JSON body and post it to api.plivo.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"src": "${ customer_secrets.PLIVO_SMS_FROM }", "dst": "${ customer_secrets.PLIVO_SMS_TO }", "text": "{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}"}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Plivo number (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Plivo destinations, direct

auth_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Plivo auth id

source_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Plivo source

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Plivo token
